text.title: Prompt Injection Test Suite Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys, types, and per-field constraints.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `prompt-injection-test-suite` (e.g. empty / placeholder owner, fewer items than minItems, missing evidence_quote / anti_output / exit_criterion as applicable). Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: free-form prose where a structured field is required
coverage missing any OWASP LLM Top 10 class
